mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO VX_GroupChat_Yesterday (owner, new_chat_cnt, chat_total, chat_has_msg, new_member_cnt, member_total, member_has_msg, msg_total, starttime, createtime) VALUES
(#{item.owner}, #{item.newChatCnt}, #{item.chatTotal}, #{item.chatHasMsg}, #{item.newMemberCnt}, #{item.memberTotal}, #{item.memberHasMsg}, #{item.msgTotal}, #{item.starttime}, GETDATE())
